title: Add MCP server presets for Google Calendar and Gmail
goal: MCP 서버 프리셋(Google Calendar, Gmail)을 추가하여 setup에서 원클릭으로 MCP 서버를 등록할 수 있게 한다. AI agent의 시스템 프롬프트에 MCP tool 사용법을 추가하여 AI가 MCP를 통해 캘린더/메일을 처리할 수 있게 한다.

test_requirements.case: list_presets returns google_calendar and gmail presets
test_requirements.expected: returns list with name, description, command, args for each
config_store has mcp_servers entry with correct command and args

test_requirements.case: GET /setup/mcp/presets returns available presets with install status
AI agent system prompt includes mcp tool description when servers configured
test_requirements.expected: system prompt mentions mcp tool with available server names

test_requirements.case: Install preset that is already installed returns idempotent success

constraints: Presets defined in mcp_presets.py, not hardcoded in routes
Do not modify existing MCP client or tool code
Preset install only stores config — does not actually start MCP server process
AI agent prompt change must be backward compatible (no MCP mention if no servers configured)
test_command: cd backend && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v
